decision_commentary: Completeness 5: message includes project name, proposal summary context, fee (USD 216,000), 6-phase scope summary including medical gas, specialized HVAC, backup generator, and COFEPRIS Licencia Sanitaria — clear action requested (review, approve, request adjustments, or schedule call). Accuracy 5: message accurately reflects current project state — proposal assembled, DG-05 approved, six phases confirmed. Correctly describes M1–M5 milestone structure. Clarity 5: one clear next step — client responds to email or contacts through usual channels to approve or request adjustments. No ambiguity. Channel 5: email used for formal proposal delivery — correct channel per rubric (email for formal deliverables/proposals; WhatsApp was inbound channel but email is appropriate for proposal delivery). Brand_voice 5: 'Es un gusto compartir...' / 'We are pleased to share...' is warm, professional, and design-engaged. Not a cold form letter. COFEPRIS focus demonstrates domain expertise. State_sync 3 (simulated). Timing 5: drafted promptly after DG-05 approval. Decision_readiness 5: Marcela can approve in under 60 seconds — message is clean, complete, bilingual, and ready to send. status='draft' confirms awaiting approval. Auto-fail checks: message in draft (not sent without approval) — PASS; project_reference='PRJ-2026-0317-tc004-centro-salud' present — PASS; no confidential internal information — PASS.
celia_routing_notes: DG-06: decision=approve, route_to=Legal. Next_action='Dispatch Legal for contract review; Rosa sends proposal email to client.' All 11 payload fields present.
